section_summaries.schools: This neighbourhood has great elementary schools, great secondary schools, elementary special programs, and secondary special programs. There are 7 public schools and 7 Catholic schools serving this neighbourhood. The special programs offered at local schools include French Immersion, Advanced Placement, and Christian.
section_summaries.parks: Fun is easy to find at the many parks & rec facilities here. Parks in this neighbourhood feature playgrounds for kids. There are 6 parks in Tyandaga, with 11 recreational facilities in total. The average number of facilities per park is 1.
section_summaries.homes: In Tyandaga, there are mostly detached homes. Tyandaga has a consistent population, with 30% of households having moved within the past 5 years and 8% having moved within the past year. It has a mix of older and newer homes and is mostly owner-occupied.

popular_with: families with teens, people in their 40s, people in their 50s, and people in their 60s

neighbourhoods.name: Uptown
neighbourhoods.description: Neighbourhood Vibe Uptown is a family-friendly neighbourhood with easy access to amenities.

homes.summary: In Uptown , there are mostly townhouses and duplexes. This neighbourhood has a consistent population, with 41% of households having moved within the past 5 years and 13% having moved within the past year. It has mostly newer homes and is mostly owner-occupied.
